name: Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over low heat.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate, then fold in the flour and chopped nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Cool slightly before cutting into 24 bars.
Reprinted with permission from:
Bar Cookies from the C and H Sugar Kitchen
by Jean Porter
Electronic format by Karen Mintzias
